documents.title: Company Newsletter: Cafeteria Menu Change
documents.body:
From: Staff Services
Date: October 2, 2025

We are pleased to announce that starting next Monday, the company cafeteria will feature a new healthy menu. The updated menu includes more salads, whole-grain options, and fresh fruit. The popular hot meal station will remain available but will now offer smaller portion sizes. A new self-serve soup station will be added near the beverage counter. The cafeteria will also extend its hours by 30 minutes, now opening at 7:30 AM and closing at 2:30 PM. Prices for most items will stay the same, though some salad options will increase slightly due to the higher cost of fresh ingredients. We welcome your feedback via the suggestion box by the entrance.

questions.question: What is the main topic of this notice?
options: Changes to the cafeteria menu and hours
questions.answer: Changes to the cafeteria menu and hours
questions.explanation: 全文主旨為宣布公司餐廳菜單更新及營業時間延長，屬於變更公告。

questions.question: What new station will be added to the cafeteria?
questions.explanation: 公告明確提到「A new self-serve soup station will be added near the beverage counter」。

questions.question: What will the new closing time be?
questions.explanation: 公告寫明延長營業時間後「closing at 2:30 PM」。

questions.question: Why will some salad options become more expensive?
options: Due to higher cost of fresh ingredients
questions.answer: Due to higher cost of fresh ingredients
questions.explanation: 公告說明價格調漲原因為「the higher cost of fresh ingredients」。

documents.title: Email: Office Supplies Order
documents.body:
From: janet.kim@accounting.com
To: supplies@officeplus.com
Subject: Monthly Office Supply Order - September

Dear Office Plus Team,

Please process the following order for our monthly office supplies:

- Printer paper (A4, 500 sheets/ream): 20 reams
- Blue ballpoint pens (box of 12): 10 boxes
- Sticky notes (3x3 inch, yellow): 15 packs
- File folders (letter size): 50 folders
- Whiteboard markers (assorted colors): 8 markers

Please deliver to our office at 450 Commerce Street, Suite 300, by Friday, September 12. Our account number is AC-78421. If any item is out of stock, please contact me before making substitutions. The purchase order number for this order is PO-2309.

Thank you,
Janet Kim
Office Administrator

questions.question: What is the purchase order number?
questions.explanation: 郵件末尾標示「The purchase order number for this order is PO-2309」。

questions.question: How many reams of printer paper are being ordered?
questions.explanation: 郵件清單中第一項為「Printer paper...20 reams」。

questions.question: What should the supplier do if an item is unavailable?
questions.explanation: 郵件要求「please contact me before making substitutions」。

documents.title: Notice: Building Maintenance Schedule
documents.body:
ATTENTION ALL TENANTS

Please be advised that the annual building maintenance will take place from November 4 to November 8. During this period, the following services will be affected:

- Elevators: Only one elevator will operate. Expect longer wait times.
- Water supply: Hot water will be unavailable on November 5 and 6 due to boiler inspection.
- Parking garage: Levels B1 and B2 will be closed for repainting on November 4-5. Please use Levels B3 and B4.
- Fire alarm testing: Brief alarms may sound on November 7 between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM. No evacuation is required.

We apologize for any inconvenience. If you have questions, please contact building management at ext. 2550.

questions.question: How long will the maintenance work last?
questions.explanation: 公告寫明「from November 4 to November 8」，共五天。

questions.question: On which days will hot water be unavailable?
questions.explanation: 公告指出「Hot water will be unavailable on November 5 and 6」。

questions.question: What should tenants do when the fire alarm sounds on November 7?
questions.explanation: 公告提醒「Brief alarms may sound...No evacuation is required」，無需疏散。

documents.title: Email: Conference Registration Confirmation

From: registration@techsummit2025.com

Dear Mark Davies,

Thank you for registering for Tech Summit 2025. Your registration details are below:

Registration ID: TS25-8842
Pass Type: Full Conference Pass (includes all sessions and workshops)
Dates: October 20-22, 2025
Venue: Metro Convention Center, Hall C
Check-in time: 8:00 AM on October 20

Additional items:
- Networking Lunch (October 21): Included

Please bring a printed copy of this confirmation or show it on your mobile device at check-in. Name badges will be issued at the registration desk.

For any changes, please contact us at least 48 hours before the event.

Best regards,
Tech Summit Registration Team

documents.title: Memo: Employee Wellness Program
documents.body:
MEMORANDUM

To: All Employees
From: Human Resources
Date: January 6, 2026
Subject: New Employee Wellness Program

We are excited to introduce a new Employee Wellness Program starting February 1. The program offers the following benefits:

- Free annual health screening (available on-site every March)
- Gym membership reimbursement: up to $30 per month with proof of attendance
- Weekly yoga classes every Wednesday at 12:15 PM in Conference Room D
- Stress management workshops held quarterly
- Access to a licensed counselor via phone or video call at no cost

To enroll, please complete the online form on the HR portal by January 25. Participation is voluntary and confidential. For more information, please contact HR representative Susan Park at ext. 4412.

questions.question: When does the wellness program begin?
questions.explanation: 備忘錄寫明「starting February 1」。

questions.question: How much gym membership reimbursement is offered per month?
questions.explanation: 備忘錄列出「Gym membership reimbursement: up to $30 per month」。

questions.question: What is the deadline to enroll in the program?
questions.explanation: 備忘錄要求「complete the online form on the HR portal by January 25」。

documents.title: Notice: Internet Service Interruption
documents.body:
From: IT Department
Date: March 14, 2026

Dear Colleagues,

Please be informed that there will be a scheduled Internet service interruption this Saturday, March 17, from 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM. Our Internet provider will be upgrading the fiber-optic cables in the building. During this time, the following services will be unavailable:

- Office Wi-Fi and wired Internet
- Remote access to company servers
- Company email (both incoming and outgoing)

However, phone lines will continue to operate normally. If you need to work remotely on Saturday, we recommend using a mobile hotspot. The VPN service will be restored automatically once the upgrade is complete. If you experience any connectivity issues after 2:00 PM, please restart your computer first before contacting the IT help desk.

IT Support
helpdesk@companyname.com

questions.question: What is the reason for the service interruption?
questions.explanation: 通知說明「Our Internet provider will be upgrading the fiber-optic cables」。

questions.question: What service will remain available during the interruption?
questions.explanation: 通知指出「phone lines will continue to operate normally」。

questions.question: What should employees do if they have connectivity problems after 2:00 PM?
questions.explanation: 通知建議「please restart your computer first before contacting the IT help desk」。

documents.title: Advertisement: Summer Internship Program
documents.body:
SUMMER INTERNSHIP PROGRAM 2026

Meridian Financial Group is now accepting applications for our 10-week summer internship program. The program runs from June 15 to August 21, 2026.

Available positions:
- Finance Intern (2 openings)
- Marketing Intern (1 opening)
- IT Support Intern (2 openings)
- Human Resources Intern (1 opening)

Qualifications:
- Must be currently enrolled in a university program (junior or senior year)
- Minimum GPA of 3.0
- Strong communication and teamwork skills

Benefits:
- $18 per hour
- Free lunch at the company cafeteria
- Mentorship from senior staff members
- Opportunity to attend professional development workshops

To apply, send your resume and a one-page cover letter to internships@meridian.com by March 31, 2026. Selected candidates will be invited for interviews in April.

questions.question: How many positions are available for Finance Interns?
questions.explanation: 廣告列出「Finance Intern (2 openings)」。

questions.question: What is the minimum GPA required?
questions.explanation: 廣告寫明「Minimum GPA of 3.0」。

questions.question: What is the hourly pay rate?
questions.explanation: 福利欄位列出「$18 per hour」。

documents.title: Email: Customer Satisfaction Survey
documents.body:
From: feedback@freshmart.com
To: valued.customer@email.com
Subject: Tell Us About Your Recent Shopping Experience

Dear Valued Customer,

Thank you for shopping at FreshMart last week. We value your opinion and would like to invite you to participate in a short customer satisfaction survey.

The survey will take approximately 5 minutes to complete and covers the following areas:
- Store cleanliness
- Product availability
- Staff friendliness
- Checkout speed

As a thank-you for your time, you will receive a $5 coupon that can be used on your next purchase of $30 or more. The coupon will be emailed to you within 24 hours after completing the survey.

Please click the link below to begin:
www.freshmart.com/survey/cust2026

This survey will close on Sunday at midnight.

We appreciate your feedback!
FreshMart Customer Relations Team

questions.question: How long does the survey take to complete?
questions.explanation: 郵件說明「The survey will take approximately 5 minutes to complete」。

questions.question: What reward is offered for completing the survey?
questions.explanation: 郵件提到「you will receive a $5 coupon」作為回饋。

questions.question: What is the minimum purchase amount to use the coupon?
questions.explanation: 郵件說明優惠券「can be used on your next purchase of $30 or more」。

documents.title: Announcement: Company Volunteer Day
documents.body:
COMPANY VOLUNTEER DAY 2026

Every year, our company dedicates one workday to giving back to the community. This year, Volunteer Day will be held on Friday, May 8.

We have partnered with three local organizations:

1. City Food Bank: Help sort and pack food donations (10 volunteers needed)
2. Riverside Park Cleanup: Remove litter and plant trees (15 volunteers needed)
3. Senior Center Visit: Spend time with elderly residents (8 volunteers needed)

Transportation will be provided from the office to all locations. Lunch will be served at each site at no cost. All participants will receive a company volunteer T-shirt.

Sign-up sheets are posted on the bulletin board near the cafeteria. Please sign up by April 24. This is a regular workday, so you will receive your normal pay for participating.

For questions, contact community@ourcompany.com.

questions.question: When is Volunteer Day?
questions.explanation: 公告寫明「Volunteer Day will be held on Friday, May 8」。

questions.question: How many volunteers are needed for the park cleanup?
questions.explanation: 公告列出「Riverside Park Cleanup...15 volunteers needed」。

questions.question: Will employees be paid for participating in Volunteer Day?
questions.explanation: 公告說明「you will receive your normal pay for participating」。

questions.question: What will all participants receive?
questions.explanation: 公告提到「All participants will receive a company volunteer T-shirt」。

documents.title: Memo: Performance Review Schedule
documents.body:
MEMORANDUM

To: All Department Managers
From: HR Director
Date: June 2, 2026
Subject: Mid-Year Performance Reviews

Mid-year performance reviews will take place from June 15 to June 26. Please ensure that you schedule a 30-minute meeting with each of your direct reports during this period.

The following documents must be submitted to HR before your meeting:
1. Employee self-evaluation form (completed by the employee)
2. Manager assessment form
3. Goal-setting worksheet for the second half of the year

All forms are available on the HR portal under the "Performance" section. The deadline for employees to submit their self-evaluations is June 10. Managers should submit their completed assessment forms and goal-setting worksheets to HR by June 30.

A training session on conducting effective performance reviews will be held on June 8 at 3:00 PM in the main conference room. Attendance is mandatory for all new managers.

Please contact HR if you have any questions.

questions.question: When is the deadline for employees to submit self-evaluations?
questions.explanation: 備忘錄寫明「The deadline for employees to submit their self-evaluations is June 10」。

questions.question: How long should each review meeting be?
questions.explanation: 備忘錄要求「schedule a 30-minute meeting with each of your direct reports」。

questions.question: Who must attend the training session on June 8?
questions.explanation: 備忘錄指出「Attendance is mandatory for all new managers」。

documents.title: Email: Vendor Change Notification
documents.body:
From: purchasing@greentech.com
To: all-departments@greentech.com
Subject: Change in Office Coffee Supplier

Dear Colleagues,

Please note that effective August 1, our office coffee services will be provided by a new supplier, BrewPerfect Coffee Co. Our contract with the previous vendor, Daily Brew Inc., will expire on July 31.

What will change:
- New coffee machines will be installed on all floors on July 30 (old machines will be removed the same day)
- The new machines offer espresso, cappuccino, and hot chocolate in addition to regular coffee
- Coffee will remain free of charge for all employees

What stays the same:
- The coffee stations will remain in their current locations
- Coffee supplies will continue to be restocked every Monday and Thursday

If you have any preferences for coffee blends or flavors, please email your suggestions to purchasing@greentech.com by July 15.

Thank you,
Purchasing Department

questions.question: When will the new coffee machines be installed?
questions.explanation: 郵件說明「New coffee machines will be installed on all floors on July 30」。

questions.question: What new beverage options will be available?
questions.explanation: 郵件列出「espresso, cappuccino, and hot chocolate in addition to regular coffee」。

questions.question: What is the deadline for submitting coffee preferences?
questions.explanation: 郵件要求「email your suggestions to purchasing@greentech.com by July 15」。

documents.title: Notice: Fire Drill Announcement
documents.body:
FIRE DRILL NOTICE

Date: Wednesday, September 10
Time: 10:30 AM (estimated duration: 20 minutes)

A scheduled fire drill will be conducted for all occupants of the Westgate Office Tower. This is a mandatory exercise.

Procedures:
1. When the alarm sounds, stop all work immediately.
2. Proceed to the nearest emergency exit. Do not use the elevators.
3. Assemble at the designated meeting point in the parking lot across the street.
4. Wait for your floor warden to take attendance.
5. Return to the building only when instructed by the fire marshal.

Floor wardens will wear orange vests for easy identification. If you have mobility concerns, please notify your floor warden in advance so that assistance can be arranged.

Note: The drill will proceed rain or shine. Please wear comfortable shoes on that day.

Building Management

questions.question: What is the estimated duration of the fire drill?
questions.explanation: 通知標示「estimated duration: 20 minutes」。

questions.question: What should occupants NOT use during the drill?
questions.explanation: 通知明確指示「Do not use the elevators」。

questions.question: How can floor wardens be identified?
questions.explanation: 通知說明「Floor wardens will wear orange vests for easy identification」。

documents.title: Email: Software License Renewal Reminder
documents.body:
From: it-admin@designstudio.com
To: creative-team@designstudio.com
Subject: License Renewal - Adobe Creative Suite

Hi Team,

This is a reminder that our Adobe Creative Suite licenses will expire on November 30. To avoid any disruption to your work, we need to process the renewal by November 15.

Current license details:
- Product: Adobe Creative Suite for Teams
- Number of licenses: 25
- Annual cost: $18,750 ($750 per license)

This year, Adobe is offering an early renewal discount of 10% if we renew by November 5. I recommend we take advantage of this offer.

Please confirm the following by October 25 so I can proceed:
1. Do you still need your Adobe license?
2. Are there any additional licenses we should add or remove?

If I do not hear from you by October 25, I will assume you still need your current license.

Thank you,
Mark Rivera
IT Administrator

questions.question: When do the current Adobe licenses expire?
questions.explanation: 郵件寫明「licenses will expire on November 30」。

questions.question: What discount does Adobe offer for early renewal?
questions.explanation: 郵件提到「Adobe is offering an early renewal discount of 10%」。

questions.question: By what date should team members confirm whether they still need their license?
questions.explanation: 郵件要求「Please confirm...by October 25」。

documents.title: Announcement: New Security Procedures
documents.body:
NEW VISITOR SECURITY PROCEDURES

Effective October 1, 2026, all visitors to our office must follow these updated security procedures:

1. All visitors must be pre-registered by their host at least 24 hours before the visit. Registration can be completed through the Visitor Management System on the company intranet.
2. Upon arrival, visitors must present a government-issued photo ID at the front desk.
3. A visitor badge will be issued and must be worn visibly at all times while in the building.
4. Visitors must be accompanied by their host at all times. Unescorted visitors will be asked to return to the lobby.
5. Visitor badges must be returned to the front desk when leaving.

These changes are being made to improve building safety. Regular contractors and delivery personnel should continue to check in at the service entrance as usual.

If you have questions, please contact the Security Office at security@companyname.com.

questions.question: How far in advance must visitors be registered?
questions.explanation: 公告寫明「All visitors must be pre-registered by their host at least 24 hours before the visit」。

questions.question: What must visitors present at the front desk?
questions.explanation: 公告要求「visitors must present a government-issued photo ID at the front desk」。

questions.question: What happens to visitors who are not accompanied by their host?
options: They are asked to return to the lobby
questions.answer: They are asked to return to the lobby
questions.explanation: 公告指出「Unescorted visitors will be asked to return to the lobby」。

documents.title: Email: Product Recall Notice
documents.body:
From: safety@homeapplianceco.com
To: registered.customers@homeapplianceco.com
Subject: Important Safety Recall - Model HC-200 Coffee Maker

Dear Customer,

Our records show that you purchased a HomeComfort HC-200 coffee maker between January and June 2025. We are issuing a voluntary safety recall for this model.

The recall is due to a potential electrical issue in the heating element that could cause the unit to overheat. While no injuries have been reported, we are taking this precaution to ensure customer safety.

What you should do:
1. Stop using the HC-200 coffee maker immediately.
2. Visit www.homeapplianceco.com/recall to register for a free replacement or refund.
3. You will receive a prepaid return shipping label to send back your unit.

This recall affects only the HC-200 model with serial numbers starting with "HC2-". No other models are affected.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. If you have questions, please call our recall hotline at 1-800-555-0234.

Home Appliance Co. Safety Team

questions.question: Why is the coffee maker being recalled?
options: A potential electrical issue with the heating element
The display screen does not work
questions.answer: A potential electrical issue with the heating element
questions.explanation: 郵件說明「The recall is due to a potential electrical issue in the heating element」。

questions.question: What options are available to affected customers?
options: A discount on a future purchase
questions.explanation: 郵件指出可「register for a free replacement or refund」。

questions.question: Which models are affected by the recall?
options: All coffee makers from this brand
Only HC-200 models with serial numbers starting with HC2-
All HC-200 models regardless of serial number
questions.answer: Only HC-200 models with serial numbers starting with HC2-
questions.explanation: 郵件明確限定「only the HC-200 model with serial numbers starting with "HC2-"」。

documents.title: Memo: Holiday Schedule 2026
documents.body:
MEMORANDUM

To: All Employees
From: Human Resources
Date: November 1, 2026
Subject: Year-End Holiday Schedule and Office Closure

Please review the following holiday schedule for December 2026 and January 2027:

Holiday Closures:
- Wednesday, December 24: Office closes at 12:00 PM (half day)
- Thursday, December 25: Closed (Christmas Day)
- Friday, December 26: Closed (Holiday observance)
- Thursday, January 1, 2027: Closed (New Year's Day)

Normal Office Days:
- December 29, 30, 31: Regular working days (remote work is allowed on these days with manager approval)

Important notes:
- All employees must use their remaining paid time off (PTO) days before December 31. Unused PTO days will not carry over to 2027, except for up to 5 days as per company policy.
- The last day for shipping and receiving packages will be December 23. Please plan your orders accordingly.

Wishing you all a happy holiday season!

HR Department

questions.question: What time does the office close on December 24?
questions.explanation: 備忘錄標明「December 24: Office closes at 12:00 PM (half day)」。

questions.question: How many PTO days can be carried over to 2027?
questions.explanation: 備忘錄說明「Unused PTO days will not carry over to 2027, except for up to 5 days as per company policy」。

questions.question: What is the last day to send packages before the holiday break?
questions.explanation: 備忘錄提醒「The last day for shipping and receiving packages will be December 23」。

documents.title: Email: Workshop Registration
documents.body:
From: training@leadershipacademy.com
To: professionals@email-list.com

Dear Professional,

We are pleased to announce our next professional development workshop:

Topic: Effective Business Writing
Date: Saturday, February 22, 2026
Time: 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM (lunch break: 12:00 PM - 1:00 PM)

Leadership Academy

documents.title: Notice: Elevator Maintenance
documents.body:
ELEVATOR MAINTENANCE NOTICE

Please be advised that the south building elevators (Elevators 1, 2, and 3) will be closed for scheduled maintenance on the following dates:

- Elevator 1: Monday, April 7 (all day)
- Elevator 2: Tuesday, April 8 (all day)
- Elevator 3: Wednesday, April 9 (all day)

During the maintenance, only one south building elevator will be closed each day. The other two south elevators, as well as all north building elevators, will operate as usual. However, please expect minor delays during peak hours (8:00 AM - 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM - 6:00 PM).

For employees with mobility concerns, please contact the Facilities Department at ext. 3340 to arrange temporary office space on the ground floor during the maintenance period.

We recommend using the stairs for floors 1 through 4 to help reduce elevator traffic during the maintenance days.

Thank you for your cooperation.
Facilities Management

questions.question: When will Elevator 2 be closed?
questions.explanation: 公告列出「Elevator 2: Tuesday, April 8 (all day)」。

questions.question: What should employees with mobility concerns do?
options: Contact Facilities for ground floor office space
questions.answer: Contact Facilities for ground floor office space
questions.explanation: 公告建議「contact the Facilities Department at ext. 3340 to arrange temporary office space on the ground floor」。

questions.question: What is the recommended alternative to using elevators?
questions.explanation: 公告建議「using the stairs for floors 1 through 4 to help reduce elevator traffic」。

documents.title: Email: Expense Report Guidelines Update
documents.body:
From: accounting@globalcorp.com
To: all-staff@globalcorp.com
Subject: Updated Expense Report Guidelines

Dear Colleagues,

Please review the following updates to our expense report policy, effective March 1, 2026:

1. Receipts: All expenses over $25 now require a receipt. Previously, the threshold was $50.
2. Meal allowance: The daily meal allowance for business travel has increased from $45 to $55.
3. Mileage reimbursement: The rate has been updated to $0.58 per mile (up from $0.55).
4. Submission deadline: Expense reports must now be submitted within 10 business days of the expense date (previously 14 days).

All expense reports must be submitted through the new online system at expenses.globalcorp.com. Paper forms will no longer be accepted after March 1.

If you have pending expenses from February, please submit them using the old form by March 5. After that date, they must be submitted through the new system.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Accounting Department

questions.question: What is the new minimum amount requiring a receipt?
questions.explanation: 郵件寫明「All expenses over $25 now require a receipt」。

questions.question: What is the new mileage reimbursement rate?
questions.explanation: 郵件說明「The rate has been updated to $0.58 per mile」。

questions.question: By what date must pending February expenses be submitted on the old form?
questions.explanation: 郵件要求「please submit them using the old form by March 5」。

questions.question: What can be inferred about the new expense policy?
options: The company wants to reduce travel
The company is tightening some rules while increasing certain allowances
The company is eliminating all expense reimbursements
The company no longer requires receipts
questions.answer: The company is tightening some rules while increasing certain allowances
questions.explanation: 比對各項變更：收據門檻從$50降至$25（變嚴），報銷期限從14天縮至10天（變嚴），但餐費補貼和里程補貼均有調升，可知公司部分規則收緊、部分津貼提高。

documents.title: Notice: Office Relocation
documents.body:
OFFICE RELOCATION NOTICE

We are pleased to announce that our company will be moving to a new office location on May 5, 2026.

New Address:
1200 Innovation Drive, 15th Floor
Riverside Business Park
Chicago, IL 60601

The new office is a 10-minute walk from Union Station and has direct access to several bus routes.

Moving Schedule:
- Friday, May 2: Packing day. Employees should pack personal items in boxes provided by Facilities. Label all boxes with your name and new floor number.
- Monday, May 5: Moving day. The office will be closed. All staff will work remotely.
- Tuesday, May 6: First day at the new office. Please arrive by 9:00 AM for a brief orientation tour.

The new office features:
- Open-plan workstations with adjustable standing desks
- Six new meeting rooms with video conferencing equipment
- A larger cafeteria with an outdoor terrace
- A fitness center on the ground floor (free for all employees)

For moving-related questions, please email move@companyname.com.

questions.question: What should employees do on May 2?
questions.explanation: 時間表寫明「Friday, May 2: Packing day」。

questions.question: What is one feature of the new office?
questions.explanation: 公告列出新辦公室設施包含「A fitness center on the ground floor (free for all employees)」。

questions.question: What should employees do on their first day at the new office?
options: Arrive by 9:00 AM for an orientation tour
questions.answer: Arrive by 9:00 AM for an orientation tour
questions.explanation: 時間表說明「Tuesday, May 6: Please arrive by 9:00 AM for a brief orientation tour」。

documents.title: Email: Team-Building Event Invitation
documents.body:
From: social@teamspirit.com
To: sales-team@teamspirit.com
Subject: You're Invited - Q3 Team-Building Event!

Hello Sales Team,

To celebrate our record-breaking Q3 sales performance, we are hosting a team-building event!

Event Details:
Date: Friday, October 17, 2026
Time: 2:00 PM - 5:00 PM (work hours)
Location: Adventure Zone, 890 Park Avenue
Activity: Indoor rock climbing and team challenges

Schedule:
2:00 PM - 2:30 PM: Safety briefing and equipment fitting
2:30 PM - 4:00 PM: Rock climbing (beginner and advanced walls available)
4:00 PM - 4:45 PM: Team relay challenge
4:45 PM - 5:00 PM: Awards and closing

What to bring:
- Comfortable clothing and athletic shoes
- A water bottle

All climbing equipment will be provided. Transportation from the office will depart at 1:30 PM and return by 5:30 PM.

Please RSVP by October 10 to social@teamspirit.com. Spots are limited to 40 participants.

Let's celebrate together!
Social Committee
